title: Ufa, Bashkortostan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ufa, Bashkortostan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ufa is a city in Bashkortostan with a population of 1,120,000. The capital of Bashkortostan, a major industrial and cultural center in the Urals with a unique blend of Russian and Bashkir cultures.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
